n: Instance: The Spectre and the Shadow, Part 4

steps.t: Get close to the first secret door inside the Blade-horn.
Examine the suspicious wall the spirit went through in the Blade-horn.
Join Khaljûn at the tomb at the end of the corridor.
Listen to the conversation between Khaljûn and Valrazâr.
Listen to Khaljûn in the crypt of the Blade-horn.
